title: Design System: Google Drive File Manager

display.purpose: Login heading, modal titles. Moments that demand attention.

body.purpose: File names, button labels, form inputs. The working text.

label.purpose: Search input, section labels. Slightly heavier for scannability.

meta.purpose: File sizes, dates, timestamps. Lightest weight, smallest size.

shadows.name: subtle
shadows.purpose: Default card state, input focus. Barely perceptible.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Card hover, dropdown menus. Signals interactivity.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Modal content, toast notifications. Commands attention.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Used for upload, search, confirm actions.
components.css: .btn-primary { background: var(--primary, #1A3A5C); color: #fff; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--primary-hover, #0F2A40); } .btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--primary, #1A3A5C); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary actions. New folder, cancel, secondary options.
components.css: .btn-outline { background: var(--bg, #fff); color: var(--text-secondary, #3D3D4E); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid var(--border, #D8DCE2); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .btn-outline:hover { background: var(--bg-hover, #ECEEF1); border-color: var(--text-muted, #6B6B7B); }

components.name: File Card
components.description: Displays a file or folder in the grid. Shows icon, name, and metadata.
components.css: .file-card { background: var(--bg, #fff); border: 1px solid var(--border, #D8DCE2); border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; position: relative; } .file-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-color: var(--primary, #1A3A5C); } .file-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--primary, #1A3A5C); outline-offset: 2px; } .file-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-align: center; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; margin-bottom: 4px; } .file-meta { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted, #6B6B7B); text-align: center; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: File search field. Full width with primary button.
components.css: .search-bar { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .search-bar input { flex: 1; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #D8DCE2); border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .search-bar input:focus { border-color: var(--primary, #1A3A5C); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(26,58,92,0.1); }

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Folder navigation path. Shows current location with clickable ancestors.
components.html: My Drive/Documents/Projects
components.css: .breadcrumb { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 8px 0; font-size: 13px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .breadcrumb a { color: var(--primary, #1A3A5C); text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 6px; transition: background 0.1s; } .breadcrumb a:hover { background: var(--primary-light, #E8EDF3); } .breadcrumb .current { color: var(--text-secondary, #3D3D4E); font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview: A tool that organizes your files with the calm precision of a well-kept desk. Every element earns its place. The system rejects visual noise: no decorative gradients, no side-stripe borders, no ornamental flourishes. Depth comes from tonal layering and subtle shadows, not from color spectacle.
keyCharacteristics: Typography-driven hierarchy (weight and size, not color)
Neutral palette with one authoritative primary and one functional accent
Keyboard-first interaction with visible focus states

rules.name: The Terracotta Rule
rules.body: The accent color appears only on interactive elements that perform an action (upload, share, delete). Never use it for decoration, backgrounds, or emphasis on static content.

rules.name: The Weight Contrast Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is built through font-weight jumps (400 to 600), not size alone. Every heading step must differ by at least 200 weight units.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus, modal open). If a shadow is always visible, it's too heavy.

dos: Do use font-weight 600 for all headings and file names. Weight contrast is the hierarchy engine.
Do keep the terracotta accent under 15% of any screen surface. Its rarity is the point.
Do use subtle shadows (0 1px 2px) at rest, elevated shadows (0 2px 8px) on hover.
Do maintain 4.5:1 contrast for all body text. The muted gray (#6B6B7B) is the floor.
Do show focus rings (2px primary, 2px offset) on all interactive elements.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards, list items, or callouts. This is the most recognizable AI-generated UI tell.
Don't use warm off-white backgrounds (#F5F0EB, #FAF7F2, #FEFCF8). These read as cream/sand/parchment and signal AI defaults. Use cool neutrals.
Don't apply background-clip: text with gradients. Decorative text is never meaningful.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter blur) decoratively. Rare and purposeful, or nothing.
Don't pair a 1px border with a box-shadow wider than 8px blur. Pick one, not both.
Don't use border-radius greater than 16px on cards. Full-pill is fine for tags and buttons only.
